empty-tree.png.description: An empty decision tree representing a search for a species of animal.
empty-tree.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Draw.io

tree-3.png.description: A portion of a decision tree representing a search for a student in class. This one has multiple branches and levels, and leaf nodes for 'Jimmy' and 'Susan'
tree-3.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Draw.io

tail-classifier-tree.png.description: An decision tree representing a search for a species of animal. The root node splits based on who has a tail. The 'no' branch has 2 tarantulas and 2 snails, while the 'yes' branch has 2 lizards, 4 dogs, and 5 cats
tail-classifier-tree.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Draw.io
